title: pouteria andarahiensis
intro: Pouteria andarahiensis, also known as Andarahie, is a species of evergreen tree native to the tropical forests of New Caledonia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The extracts and essential oils derived from this plant have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Pouteria andarahiensis is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are used to treat various ailments, such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues.
